title: Plan
planChangeDate: Your plan will change to {{plan}} on {{date}}
cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel your subscription?
renewConfirm: Are you sure you want to restart your subscription?

creditPurchaseModal.title: Purchase Additional Credits
features: Access to the premium AI model

whatIsCredit.question: 1. What are credits?
answers: Credits are units consumed when using various AI features such as business plan generation, editing, and format conversion on DocsHunt.
When you subscribe to the Pro plan, 10,000 credits are provided, and you can purchase additional credits if you run out.

creditSystem.question: 2. How many credits do I get with my plan?

additionalPurchase.question: 3. Can I purchase additional credits?
answers: Additional credits can only be purchased with the Pro plan or higher.
You can purchase a minimum of 10,000 credits from the [Plans&Billing] page.

carryOver.question: 4. Do credits expire?
answers: Credits included with the Pro plan are reset monthly and do not roll over.
Additional credits you purchase do not expire and are permanently retained.

changeConfirm.title: Change to this plan?
changeConfirm.description: The plan will be applied from the next billing date.

errorModal.title: Unable to process request
errorModal.description:
Please try again later.
If the problem persists, please contact us.

insufficient.title: You're low on credits
insufficient.productCreationDescription: Creating a new project requires {{credit}} credits.

blurContent.title: Curious about your business's core strategy?
blurContent.description: Upgrade your plan to view the complete business plan content.
